name: blogpilot-ai
description: Open-source AI-powered SEO content studio. Built by Dice Codes.

scripts.stop: node -e "const p=Number(process.env.PORT||3000);try{const c=require('child_process');const cmd=process.platform==='win32'?`for /f \"tokens=5\" %a in ('netstat -aon ^| findstr :${p}') do taskkill /F /PID %a`:`lsof -ti :${p} | xargs -r kill -9`;c.execSync(cmd,{stdio:'inherit',shell:true})}catch{console.log('No process on port '+p)}"
scripts.preinstall: node -e "const v=process.versions.node.split('.').map(Number);if(v[0]<18){console.error('\n[BlogPilot] Node 18+ required. You have '+process.versions.node+'. Upgrade: https://nodejs.org/');process.exit(1)}"
